response.step_by_step_log: The video consists of 3D characters talking in Japanese. At 02:00, the song 'Mach Go Go Go' begins. I identified the song title 'マッハ・ゴー・ゴー・ゴー 1997' from on-screen text. I searched for 'マッハ・ゴー・ゴー・ゴー 1997 Japanese and English lyrics' and found the song title, original artist (Tatsunoko Production/Original Anime), and lyrics. The performer is the VTuber character Korone.
response.global_summary: The video shows a 3D dance performance by three characters, with a segment featuring a solo performance by the character Korone singing the opening theme song from the 1997 anime 'Mach GoGoGo'. The video includes segments of dialogue before and after the performance.

scenes.description: The song 'Mach Go Go Go' (1997) plays as the character Korone performs a dance. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.song_title: マッハ・ゴー・ゴー・ゴー (Mach Go Go Go)
